questionHtml: Explain two reasons why a government might want to subsidize a good or service.
markschemeHtml:
Answers may include:

  • definition of subsidy
  • diagram to show the effect of a subsidy on a good or service
  • explanation that governments might introduce a subsidy for different reasons, to correct externalities, to protect domestic industry
  • example(s) of goods and services that governments subsidize and the reasons for doing so.

Marks should be allocated according to the Paper 1 markbands for May 2013 forward, part A.

meta.title: Explain two reasons why a government might want to subsidize a good or service.
breadcrumbLabels: 2.7.1 Reasons for government intervention in markets
